# MWL AI — Arabic AI Tools Directory

## About
MWL AI is the largest Arabic-language directory of AI tools, featuring 500+ curated tools with exclusive coupons and deals for the Arab and Gulf market.

## What We Cover
- AI Chatbots: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Mistral
- Coding Tools: Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Lovable, Bolt
- Image Generation: Midjourney, DALL-E, FLUX.1, Ideogram, Leonardo
- Video Generation: Kling AI 2.0, Seedance, Veo 3, Runway, Sora 2.0, Hailuo
- Audio & Music: ElevenLabs, Suno v4, Udio, Murf, Krisp
- Marketing & SEO: Semrush, Ahrefs, HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Snov.io
- Productivity: Notion AI, Gamma, Fathom, Zapier, Make, n8n
- Hosting: Hostinger, Cloudways, Namecheap, FastComet, InterServer
- E-commerce: Shopify, WooCommerce, Salla, Zid, Helium10

## Exclusive Affiliate Deals (June 2026)
- Hostinger: 75% off with code MWL — https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=X95AHMED
- GoHighLevel: 14-day free trial — https://gohighlevel.com/?fp_ref=ahmdai
- GetResponse: 30-day free trial — https://getresponse.com?a=Cnp6DJnVFP
- Shopify: $1 for 3 months — https://shopify.pxf.io/offer1doler
- Cloudways: 3 months free — https://cloudways.com/en/?id=1255825
- Helium 10: 20% off — code 20OFF6M
- Luminar Neo: 20% off — code MWLAI20
- TalkPal: Free credits included
- SentryPC: 20% off — code SENTRY20

## Language Support
Primary: Arabic (RTL, MSA + dialects)
Secondary: English (LTR)

## Target Audience
Arab world users, Gulf region (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman), Egypt, Jordan, Lebanon, Morocco

## Data Freshness
Updated: June 2026
Tool count: 500+
Categories: 18

## Site Structure
- /          → Homepage with trending + affiliate spotlight
- /tools     → Full 500-tool searchable directory
- /coupons   → All affiliate coupons and deals
- /categories → Browse by category
- /tools/[slug] → Individual tool page with SEO, JSON-LD, alternatives
